headline: Mile High Royal Lions: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Mile High Royal Lions is projected #3 of 16 with a 83.88 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Jahmyr Gibbs, Drake London, and Jalen Hurts. The immediate priority is improving the RB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 29, Mile High Royal Lions traded with TacticsNoob and acquired Marvin Harrison while sending Rachaad White, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9). Marvin Harrison is now the current FLEX starter at 72.8 C-AVI and 79.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the RB slot above J.K. Dobbins's 58.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 94.9 C-AVI would directly attack the 4.51-point projected gap to Big Balder Brand.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On October 28, SmokyValleyWheatWarriors traded with Hit & Ruggs 🏎️ and acquired 2026 Round 3 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 1) while sending Kayshon Boutte. The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On October 28, SmokyValleyWheatWarriors traded with Hit & Ruggs 🏎️ and acquired 2026 Round 3 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 1) while sending Kayshon Boutte. The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #3 of 16 at 83.88 lineup C-AVI. Big Balder Brand is immediately above at 88.39, a gap of 4.51. SmokyValleyWheatWarriors is immediately behind at 82.80.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jahmyr Gibbs (99.6), Drake London (97.8), and Jalen Hurts (91.2).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On October 29, Mile High Royal Lions traded with TacticsNoob and acquired Marvin Harrison while sending Rachaad White, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 1 (original roster 9). Marvin Harrison is now the current FLEX starter at 72.8 C-AVI and 79.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the RB slot above J.K. Dobbins's 58.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 94.9 C-AVI would directly attack the 4.51-point projected gap to Big Balder Brand. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: J.K. Dobbins is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 58.8. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.body: All 12 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
